title.rendered: Thank you for registering for our upcoming webinar!

content.rendered:
You will soon receive a confirmation email from GoToWebinar that includes your login information.

Our 2026 Certificate in Social Media Marketing & Fundraising starts April 29!

The 2026 Certificate in Social Media Marketing & Fundraising program covers the fundamentals of social media marketing and fundraising for your nonprofit. Participants will learn how to create a social media strategy, craft a content marketing plan, and current best practices for using social media for community engagement and fundraising. The total cost is $229 USD.
